race.comment: Sticking with the progressive WILD DANCER (2) who was strongly fancied fresh and lifted strongly to score here over 1009m. Has upside and expected to go close again. GEEGEES DOWNPOUR (6) has been knocking on the door with two close-up fourths last two. Change of rider and off the inside looks the main danger. CAPTAIN CAM (1) was good fresh despite finishing fifth. Fitter and drops in grade for this. Should be right in the finish. PLATINUM REGGAE (8) has been no match for Blameitontheboogie last two but is going ok and worth including. WHO CAN IT BE NOW (5) has been freshened and best form stacks up.
